Then you may search for matching positions in Germany’s major job board, the Jobsuche (available only in German). You may also narrow your search down, for example according to City or Federal State Working hours (full- or part-time) Nature of activity (for example, training or a job) Then you may search for matching positions in Germany’s major job board, the Jobsuche (available only in German).
